message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate tokenizer_mod bracket patterns to emitCallCtx

- handleEncode: PyString.getValue() now uses emitCallCtx
- handleCountTokens: runtime.tokenizer.encode() uses nested emitCallCtx
- handleLoad: runtime.tokenizer.init() uses emitCallCtx
- handlePreTokenize: pre_tokenizers.whitespace() uses emitCallCtx
- handleNormalize: normalizers.lowercase() uses emitCallCtx

Ensures bracket matching through function structure.
